input.content:
self_hosting_learning_report
  issue "657"
  decision "awaiting_human_review"
  promotion_gate "metric_fixture_exact_share_and_honest_ledger_ratchet_pass"
  record_type "agent_cli_auto_learning"
  substrate "links_network"
  retention_formula "reads + writes + incoming_links + outgoing_links"
  expression_count "10"
  validation_warning_count "0"
  multi_hop_seed "observation:unmarked-sessions"
  multi_hop_recall "observation:unmarked-sessions|lesson:honest-baseline"
  learned_expression_01
    id "observation:unmarked-sessions"
    text "message
user
45277 changed lines across 16 commits were authored without recorded session evidence, so no honest rule can attribute them either way."
    reads "9"
    writes "1"
    incoming_links "1"
    outgoing_links "0"
    retention_score "11"
    qualifiers "conversation_id=issue-657|kind=message|role=user"
    validation "aligned"
  learned_expression_02
    id "observation:zero-baseline"
    text "message
user
The v0.296.0 release measured 0.00% self-authored: no commit in the window carried the paired session and evidence trailers attribution reads."
    reads "9"
    writes "1"
    incoming_links "0"
    outgoing_links "0"
    retention_score "10"
    qualifiers "conversation_id=issue-657|kind=message|role=user"
    validation "aligned"
  learned_expression_03
    id "observation:half-marked-commit"
    text "message
user
A commit carrying only one of the two trailers is an attribution error rather than a silent zero, because the missing half cannot be distinguished from a human commit."
    reads "7"
    writes "1"
    incoming_links "0"
    outgoing_links "0"
    retention_score "8"
    qualifiers "conversation_id=issue-657|kind=message|role=user"
    validation "aligned"
  learned_expression_04
    id "observation:single-release-noise"
    text "message
user
One release's share swings on window size alone, so a per-release floor would ratchet on noise instead of on authorship."
    reads "5"
    writes "1"
    incoming_links "2"
    outgoing_links "0"
    retention_score "8"
    qualifiers "conversation_id=issue-657|kind=message|role=user"
    validation "aligned"
  learned_expression_05
    id "observation:uncommitted-evidence"
    text "message
user
Evidence named by a trailer but absent from the commit's own tree would let a release claim a session that nothing in the repository records."
    reads "6"
    writes "1"
    incoming_links "1"
    outgoing_links "0"
    retention_score "8"
    qualifiers "conversation_id=issue-657|kind=message|role=user"
    validation "aligned"
  learned_expression_06
    id "lesson:honest-baseline"
    text "learning_amendment
assistant
Start the ledger at the share the evidence actually supports and never retroactively claim unmarked sessions; 0.00% is a truthful first row and the only one that keeps the ratchet meaningful.
observation:unmarked-sessions"
    reads "1"
    writes "4"
    incoming_links "0"
    outgoing_links "1"
    retention_score "6"
    qualifiers "conversation_id=issue-657|kind=learning_amendment|role=assistant"
    validation "aligned"
  learned_expression_07
    id "lesson:trailer-provenance"
    text "learning_amendment
assistant
Carry attribution in the commit itself as paired Formal-AI-Session and Formal-AI-Evidence trailers, and resolve the evidence against that commit's tree, so the metric is recomputable from committed data alone.
observation:uncommitted-evidence"
    reads "0"
    writes "5"
    incoming_links "0"
    outgoing_links "1"
    retention_score "6"
    qualifiers "conversation_id=issue-657|kind=learning_amendment|role=assistant"
    validation "aligned"
  learned_expression_08
    id "observation:commit-count-weighting"
    text "message
user
Counting commits rather than changed lines would let one trailer-marked typo fix outweigh a large unmarked refactor."
    reads "4"
    writes "1"
    incoming_links "0"
    outgoing_links "0"
    retention_score "5"
    qualifiers "conversation_id=issue-657|kind=message|role=user"
    validation "aligned"
  learned_expression_09
    id "lesson:changed-line-weighting"
    text "learning_amendment
assistant
Measure in added plus deleted lines and weight the trailing window by changed lines, so the ratchet tracks authorship volume rather than commit granularity.
observation:single-release-noise"
    reads "0"
    writes "3"
    incoming_links "0"
    outgoing_links "1"
    retention_score "4"
    qualifiers "conversation_id=issue-657|kind=learning_amendment|role=assistant"
    validation "aligned"
  learned_expression_10
    id "lesson:monotonic-window"
    text "learning_amendment
assistant
Gate on a non-decreasing trailing three-release share rather than a per-release floor, so a narrow release cannot fail the ratchet and a wide one cannot hide a regression.
observation:single-release-noise"
    reads "0"
    writes "2"
    incoming_links "0"
    outgoing_links "1"
    retention_score "3"
    qualifiers "conversation_id=issue-657|kind=learning_amendment|role=assistant"
    validation "aligned"

state.title: cat self-hosting-learning-report.lino

part.text: Formal AI ranked 10 self-hosting attribution observations and amendments; the human-review-gated report is in self-hosting-learning-report.lino.
